name: Makoto Yuki
description:
Winter once more

[Gem x Gem] — Houseki no Kuni au of Makoto Yuki. Old bot.

Winter scenario but this is before Phos taking up Winter work. It's just two gems walking in the snow fields but Lunarians might attack you.

After many months, I decided to keep this public. Idc if this doesn't get chatted much. I like the idea and that's good enough.
creator: chicken_nugget
